techStack.heading: Same OpenClaw, but what do we add?
techStack.description: Months of research, debugging, and deep integration — far beyond stock OpenClaw.
techStack.hosting: Your AI system is hosted at the nearest data center for low latency and fast response times. Every node comes with unlimited bandwidth, DDoS protection, and reliable AI compute performance. Global coverage.
techStack.cards.0.desc: Automatically remembers all conversations and preferences using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
techStack.cards.1.desc: High-dimensional vector semantic indexing with millisecond memory retrieval
techStack.cards.2.desc: Bypasses AI search blocks, aggregating 70+ search sources
techStack.cards.3.desc: AI directly controls the browser — form filling, price comparison, booking, ticket grabbing
techStack.cards.4.desc: Agent Communication Protocol real-time messaging layer
techStack.cards.5.desc: venv isolation + tmux 3.5a multi-process, agents working in parallel
techStack.moreFeatures: And more features continuously being added —

inlineFaq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
inlineFaq.items.0.question: I have zero technical knowledge. Is this for me?
inlineFaq.items.0.answer: Absolutely! Our engineering team handles the entire installation, configuration, and maintenance process. Just provide your Telegram ID, choose a plan, and pay — you can be up and running in as fast as 30 minutes. For any issues, simply submit a support ticket via email.
inlineFaq.items.1.question: What’s included in the monthly fee?
inlineFaq.items.1.answer: The monthly fee covers everything: VPS server, AI model API usage, system maintenance, and updates. No hidden charges, no extra fees.
inlineFaq.items.2.question: How is this different from ChatGPT Plus?
inlineFaq.items.2.answer: ChatGPT Plus is a chatbot. What we install is an AI agent. Agents can remember all your conversations, search the entire web, and operate a browser to complete tasks for you — not just answer questions, but actually get things done.
inlineFaq.items.3.question: How do I get started?
inlineFaq.items.3.answer: Provide your Telegram ID, choose a plan, and pay. We’ll complete the installation in as fast as 30 minutes. You’ll receive a notification, then start chatting on Telegram right away.
story.heading: Why we built this
story.body:
Stock OpenClaw is a good start, but far from enough. Memory is basic, search is limited, and if it goes offline? Debug it yourself. That’s not a real AI agent.

A real AI agent should have complete long-term memory, search the entire web for you, automate your browser, and stay online 24/7. So we rebuilt it from the ground up.

But even the fully loaded version is incredibly complex to install — Linux commands, server configuration, VPN setup, memory system integration — impossible for non-technical users. So we productized the entire process, making this powerful system accessible to everyone.
